subject: src/GitVersion.Configuration/Synthesis CLI surface
notes: DetectionOnlySynthesis, SemanticMapper, YamlEmitter, AmbiguityDetector are declared as public types with full test coverage of the in-process construction path; no CLI verb or GitVersionExecutor branch routes user invocation to them.

subject: branches.<name>: null in GitVersion.yml loader
notes: Setting a branch entry to null raises NullReferenceException with no structured diagnostic; the documented mechanisms for overriding preset branches address modification of fields but do not address removal of a preset-shipped branch family from the effective configuration.

subject: new-cli/ ConfigInitCommand
notes: Command class is registered in the new-cli surface and discoverable via /help; the implementation body emits log lines and returns without producing or modifying a configuration file.
